results.title: St. Clair County sheriff’s office launches distracted driving course for teens
results.description: The St. Clair County Sheriff's Office has started a free distracted driving course to teach teens about traffic safety, impaired driving, and the dangers of distractions behind the wheel.

results.title: London, Ont. retirement home goes viral on social media
results.description: Employees and residents at Oakcrossing Retirement Living in London, Ont. are using social media to teach users an important lesson.

results.title: GHK-Cu: A Trimeric Signal at the Intersection of Regeneration, Genomic Modulation, and Systems Coordination
results.description: Within the expanding domain of regulatory peptides, certain sequences have drawn sustained theoretical interest not due to size or complexity, but because of their disproportionate signaling reach. GHK-Cu, a copper-binding tripeptide composed of glycine, histidine, and lysine complexed with a divalent copper ion, occupies a distinctive position in this category. Rather than functioning as a classical ligand with a narrow [...] The post GHK-Cu: A Trimeric Signal at the Intersection of Regeneration, Genomic Modulation, and Systems Coordination first appeared on Thousand Oaks Acorn .

results.title: PSG Would '100%' Try to Sign Barcelona Star Lamine Yamal: Insider
results.description: PSG would '100%' try to sign Barcelona's Lamine Yamal if the Spanish club ever opens the door, according to an insider. The 18-year-old is valued at $218M.

results.title: Stay weather aware Wednesday with the risk of severe thunderstorms
Iran targeting US bases across the region
results.description: Iran targeting US bases across the region A number of US bases across the region have been targeted in response to US "aggression in southern Iran", Iranian media is reporting based on the top joint military command.

results.title: South Korea, U.S. align on nuclear-powered subs
results.description: S. Korea says Seoul and Washington share the view that domestically built nuclear-powered submarines would strengthen alliance defense capabilities.

results.title: Bangor voters weigh key election issues
results.description: Bangor voters cited costs, healthcare, and tax relief as key issues influencing their decisions at the polls.

results.title: Navy Admiral Fired by Hegseth Advances to Runoff to Replace Mace
results.description: Nancy Lacore would face a tough fall election in a district drawn in 2021 to be more Republican. She is seeking to replace Representative Nancy Mace, who ran unsuccessfully for governor instead of running for re-election.

results.title: Rain has arrived too late for Australian farmers. El Niño could make things worse
results.description: An El Niño event is likely in the coming months. It's impact on Australian farmers isn't certain, but the timing is concerning. The post Rain has arrived too late for Australian farmers. El Niño could make things worse appeared first on Crikey .

results.title: Democrat Xavier Becerra and Republican Steve Hilton will face off in California governor’s race
results.description: Republican Steve Hilton has advanced to the general election for California governor after making the case that the state desperately needs new leadership following more than 15 years of Democratic dominance. He’ll face Democrat Xavier Becerra, a former state attorney...
